Dialog.name: MND_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, Elizabeth asked[n]me to get a specific item for her...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 -1 -1 0 0}Hm? You're looking for a triangular sword?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 -1 -1 0 0}Is that supposed to be a riddle? I'm not sure what you mean...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4061 0 0}Hm, a triangular object used for dueling...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}By any chance, are you talking about a fencing épée?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's not a triangular sword, no, but the cross-section does resemble a triangle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4112 0 0}Here you go. Do you plan on taking up fencing?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}If so, I can teach you a thing or two once I have some spare time.[n]{f 1 1}
